Phase summary: degraded review ran one prosecution pass and resolved all findings.

```yaml
finding_dispositions:
  schema_version: 1
  passes_run: [1]
  entries:
    - finding_id: F1
      pass: 1
      disposition: incorporate
      classification: load-bearing
      disposition_rationale: "The proposed change affects the user-visible escalation boundary."
    - finding_id: F2
      pass: 1
      disposition: dismiss
      classification: routine
      disposition_rationale: "The finding repeats an already satisfied wording constraint."
```
